source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 习近平将出席世界人工智能大会开幕式
topics.official_english: Xi Jinping to Attend Opening Ceremony of World Artificial Intelligence Conference
topics.why_hot: President Xi's attendance signals high-level government support for AI development, a key tech and economic priority.
topics.share_angle: China's AI ambitions: President Xi to open major AI conference, highlighting national strategy.

topics.official_english: Typhoon Bavi Brings Heavy Rain and Strong Winds
topics.why_hot: Typhoon Bavi is affecting large areas, causing public concern about safety and disruptions.
topics.share_angle: Typhoon Bavi hits: How China prepares for extreme weather events.

topics.chinese_topic: 未来五年 这样提高国民健康水平
topics.official_english: China Unveils Five-Year Plan to Improve National Health
topics.why_hot: Health is a top public concern; the five-year plan outlines concrete measures for healthcare improvement.
topics.share_angle: China's health roadmap: What the new five-year plan means for citizens.

topics.official_english: Average Daily Phone Call Duration Drops to 8.7 Minutes
topics.why_hot: Reflects changing communication habits with rise of messaging apps, sparking discussion on social connectivity.
topics.share_angle: Are we talking less? China's daily call time hits new low.

topics.chinese_topic: 净网：严打编造传播涉汛等涉灾谣言
topics.official_english: China Cracks Down on Disaster-Related Rumors Online
topics.why_hot: Typhoon season increases rumor risks; government action to ensure accurate information is widely supported.
topics.share_angle: Fighting fake news: China targets disaster rumors during typhoon season.

topics.chinese_topic: 中山大学：222人取消录取资格
topics.official_english: Sun Yat-sen University Revokes Admission of 222 Students
topics.why_hot: High-profile university admission scandal raises questions about fairness and integrity in education.
topics.share_angle: Admission revoked: What happened at Sun Yat-sen University?

topics.chinese_topic: 长鑫近2万员工每人或可分超百万
topics.official_english: ChangXin Memory Technologies May Distribute Over 1 Million Yuan Per Employee
topics.why_hot: Massive employee bonus highlights success of Chinese semiconductor company, sparking discussion on tech industry wealth.
topics.share_angle: Chipmaker's windfall: ChangXin employees could get million-yuan bonuses.

topics.chinese_topic: 海南将禁售燃油车 释放什么信号
topics.official_english: Hainan to Ban Sales of Gasoline Cars: What Signal Does It Send?
topics.why_hot: First province to ban fuel cars signals China's aggressive push for electric vehicles and green energy.
topics.share_angle: China's first fuel car ban: Hainan leads the way to an electric future.
